subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification befit the loved ones of the Lord of Names, whom neither the tyranny of the oppressors nor the hindrances of them that impede can deter from His remembrance and praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا اولیای مالک اسما را سزاست که ظلم ظالمین و منع مانعین ایشانرا از ذکر و ثنا و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness
